# Raritan

**Category:** Switchgear, PDU & Busway  
**Website:** https://www.raritan.com/

## Headline
Rack-level intelligent PDU and power monitoring specialist for white-space visibility, control, and dense compute operations.

## Overview
Raritan matters because rack-level power distribution and telemetry become more important as density rises. It belongs in the market map as a strong niche supplier for buyers who need to understand not just bulk electrical architecture, but what happens at the rack and row layer where operational visibility really starts to matter.

## Key capabilities
- intelligent PDUs and rack power distribution
- rack-level telemetry, metering, and monitoring visibility
- white-space power infrastructure relevance for enterprise, colocation, and AI deployments

## Best fit for
- teams comparing rack-level power visibility vendors
- operators who already understand upstream power architecture and now need sharper row-level instrumentation
- buyers evaluating dense compute operations where telemetry and distribution detail matter

## Considerations
Best reviewed alongside Legrand, Eaton, and Vertiv depending on whether the emphasis is niche rack telemetry, broader electrical distribution, or platform breadth.
